text:
purpose is to delete a diagnosis code from the claim, the medical record number should be 
“8”. 
SHORT NAME: CLM_MDCL_REC 
LONG NAME: CLM_MDCL_REC 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs) 
FILE(S): 
IP base 
SNF base 
HH base 
OP base 
Carrier base 
DME base 
VALUES: 
8 = MAO is deleting the diagnoses on the record. 
Null/missing 
COMMENT: 
This variable may be null/missing. No values other than 8 are in this field.
